text: Apple maintains a strong competitive position in the consumer electronics market, driven by its brand loyalty and innovative product offerings. As of 2025, Apple held approximately 20% of the global smartphone market, according to industry reports (chunk_id_35dda38d-318e-4e7b-aab2-fdecab9788b8). The company's ecosystem of devices and services creates a significant barrier to entry, enhancing its moat. Additionally, Apple's focus on user privacy and security differentiates it from competitors like Samsung and Huawei.
